blended.narrative: Devil's Head is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,870 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder. Models disagree — check back.
Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 42°F.
